observations.polarity: Left: Looking back is warned against; Right: Not looking back is chosen
observations.summary: The place is described as a house that has chosen to destroy itself, with old stories warning not to look back when leaving such a place. The subject consciously chooses not to look back, emphasizing a tension between the temptation or danger of looking back and the resolve to move forward.

left_evidence.quote: Some old stories warn you not to look back at such a place when you leave it.

right_evidence.quote: He was not going to look back.

bridge_evidence.quote: A house that had chosen to destroy itself.
